description: PRD-14 · P9.4 P2 高级域 3 子域 15 US(域 ⑭ A/B 测试管理 · 域 ⑮ 知识库 / 常量管理完整版本化 · 域 ⑯ 系统配置中心 5+ 紧急开关)· 派生 ADMIN §3.7 + §8.6 + DATA-MODEL §13.7 4 张占位表 · 继承 PRD-13 8 patterns + 4 _xxxInTx 单点 + 11 LD-A 红线 · D-102~D-115 14 LDs · §7.5 协议锁 18 entries

userStories.title: ab_experiments + ab_assignments schema + service + Approval 触发 · foundation
userStories.description: 作为 super_admin · 我需要 ab_experiments + ab_assignments 表 + service 落地 · 以便后续 5 子 US(显著性检验 + 自动停损 + admin UI)依赖。复用 PRD-13 US-002 approval_requests dual approval(actionType='start_ab_experiment' 走 dual)· _startAbExperimentInTx + _stopAbExperimentInTx 单点 + LD-A9 红线。
acceptanceCriteria: prisma/schema.prisma 确认 §13.7 占位 AbExperiment + AbAssignment 已写(line 3436-3464)· verify 字段 + 加 index 若缺
migration `pnpm prisma migrate dev --name prd-14-ab-experiments` 成功 · seed 0 row

apps/api/src/services/admin/ab-experiment/ab-experiment.service.ts 新建 · 导出 _startAbExperimentInTx(tx, {experimentId, adminId, approvalRequestId}) + _stopAbExperimentInTx(tx, {experimentId, adminId, stopReason, resultSummary?}) 2 单点 + createAbExperiment + startAbExperiment(走 dual approval) + assignUserToVariant
_startAbExperimentInTx · 写 ab_experiments.status='running' + startedAt=now() · admin_audit_log eventType='ab_experiment_start' eventCategory='high_risk_action' · 接 tx 不自起 transaction
_stopAbExperimentInTx · 写 status='stopped' + stoppedAt + resultSummary · audit eventType='ab_experiment_stop' · 关联 stopReason payload
assignUserToVariant deterministic hash · md5(${userId}:${experimentKey}).slice(0,8) % 100 → control(0-49) / variant_a(50-74) / variant_b(75-99) · upsert · 同 user × experiment 多次调返已分组
startAbExperiment 内部强制走 requestApproval({actionType:'start_ab_experiment', requireDualApproval:true}) · 不绕过 · approvalGateService.ts DUAL_APPROVAL_ACTION_TYPES set 加 'start_ab_experiment'
AGENTS.md §10.1 加 LD-A9 节 · grep `(prisma|db|tx)\.abExperiment\.update.*(status|stoppedAt|startedAt)` 排除 ab-experiment.service.ts + ab-stop-loss.job.ts + .test. · 期望 0 命中
scripts/audit-redlines-admin.sh 加 §LD-A9 段(line 137+ LD-A8 之后)· grep 同 AGENTS · 9 LD-A 总检测
不破坏 PRD-13 approvalGateService.ts 现有 8 dual actionType(加 'start_ab_experiment' 到 set 不影响其他)
pnpm audit:redlines / audit:ld / audit:redlines-admin · 0 命中(含 plan-check 2.6.17 LD-A 三方一致性)
pnpm test ≥ 1730 pass · 0 fail(基线 1727 + 本 US ≥ 3 新 tests)
pnpm typecheck · 0 errors
Typecheck passes

anti_patterns.lesson: _startAbExperimentInTx 接 tx · 不自起 $transaction
anti_patterns.antipattern: await prisma.$transaction([abExperiment.update]) 内嵌
anti_patterns.correct: await prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => { await _startAbExperimentInTx(tx, ...) }) · tx 接受 · 跟 PRD-13 4 _xxxInTx 同 pattern

anti_patterns.lesson: deterministic hash · 同 user × experiment 多次调返一致 variant
anti_patterns.antipattern: Math.random() < threshold(每次结果不同)
anti_patterns.correct: parseInt(md5(userId:experimentKey).slice(0,8), 16) % 100 < threshold · 按 trafficAllocation 累积

anti_patterns.lesson: AbAssignment upsert · 不每次 INSERT 新 row
anti_patterns.antipattern: assignUserToVariant 每次都 prisma.abAssignment.create
anti_patterns.correct: upsert WHERE experimentId+userId · 第一次 INSERT · 后续返已有 variant

userStories.title: 显著性检验 service · Chi-square + Welch t-test + 多维分析(转化率/留存/成本)
userStories.description: 作为 super_admin · 我需要 A/B 实验结果分析 service · Chi-square(分类型 · 转化率)+ Welch t-test(连续型 · 留存/成本)· 多维分析(3 标准 metric)· 输出 p-value + 显著性结论(p<0.05)+ recommendation(continue/stop_winner/stop_loser/inconclusive)。
acceptanceCriteria: apps/api/src/services/admin/ab-experiment/significance.service.ts 新建 · 导出 chiSquareTest + welchTTest + computeExperimentSignificance
SignificanceTestResult interface · { metric, testType, pValue, isSignificant, effect, sampleSize, confidence, recommendation: 'continue'|'stop_winner'|'stop_loser'|'inconclusive' }
Chi-square 用 @stdlib/stats-base-dists-chisquare-cdf · degrees_of_freedom=1 · 双侧 p-value
Welch t-test 用 @stdlib/stats-base-dists-t-cdf · 允许方差不等 · 双侧 p-value
computeExperimentSignificance 3 标准 metric: conversion(stepData completed_step_count>=7)/ retention(7 日 last_login_at>=assigned_at+7d)/ cost(cost_log SUM(cost_usd) GROUP BY variant)
支持 admin 自定义 metric(参数 metrics 数组 SQL 查询函数)· Promise.all 并行 fetch
SampleSize < 30 → recommendation='inconclusive' · 不计算 p-value(防假阳性)
p-value > 0.05 → continue · p-value < 0.05 + variant 好 → stop_winner · p-value < 0.05 + variant 恶化 > 10% → stop_loser
apps/api/package.json 加 @stdlib/stats-base-dists-chisquare-cdf + @stdlib/stats-base-dists-t-cdf 依赖
单测覆盖标准 fixture(已知 control/variant 数据 expected pValue 对比)
不破坏 PRD-1~13 数据查询路径 · 仅新加查询
pnpm audit / test ≥ 1742 / typecheck 全 PASS
Typecheck passes

anti_patterns.lesson: Chi-square + Welch t-test 用 @stdlib/stats · 不自手写
anti_patterns.antipattern: function chiSquareCdf(x) {...} 自实现(精度不可信)
anti_patterns.correct: import { cdf as chisquareCdf } from '@stdlib/stats-base-dists-chisquare-cdf'

anti_patterns.lesson: SampleSize < 30 必返 inconclusive
anti_patterns.antipattern: 直接算 p-value 不校验 sample(假阳性高)
anti_patterns.correct: if (control.length < 30 || variant.length < 30) return { recommendation: 'inconclusive', isSignificant: false }

anti_patterns.lesson: 多维 metric 异步并行查询
anti_patterns.antipattern: 顺序 await metrics.map(m => m.query()) 慢
anti_patterns.correct: await Promise.all(metrics.map(m => m.query(variant))) 并行

userStories.title: 自动停损 cron + alert(B 组指标恶化 > 30% 触发回滚 100% control)
userStories.description: 作为 super_admin · 我需要 BullMQ cron 自动跑 A/B 实验显著性检验 · B 组关键指标恶化超 30% → 自动停损 + 钉钉告警(D-077 isMock 默认)· dedupe per experimentId per day。
acceptanceCriteria: apps/api/src/jobs/admin/ab-stop-loss.job.ts 新建 · BullMQ cron '0 0 * * * *' hourly Asia/Shanghai · jobId='ab-stop-loss-recurring' · attempts=3 · D-096 错峰扩展(整点)
scanAbExperimentsForStopLoss · 扫所有 status='running' 实验 · 跑 computeExperimentSignificance(3 标准 metric)
触发条件: 任一 metric recommendation='stop_loser' AND effect < -30%(双条件)
触发后调 _stopAbExperimentInTx(tx, {experimentId, adminId:0, stopReason:'auto_stop_loss', resultSummary})
写 admin_audit_log eventType='ab_experiment_auto_stop_loss' eventCategory='security_alert' · 必含 reasoning(metric / pValue / effect)
钉钉告警 D-077 isMock=true 默认 · 真启 PRR
dedupe per experimentId per day · adminAuditLog.findFirst({eventType:'ab_experiment_auto_stop_loss', payload.experimentId, createdAt:{gte: 24h ago}})
super_admin manual stop 同样走 _stopAbExperimentInTx(stopReason='manual') · 不绕过单点
tests/unit/api/admin/ab-stop-loss.test.ts ≥ 8 it · cron register + 触发/不触发条件 + dedupe + dingtalk isMock + manual stop · failed 兜底
apps/api/src/index.ts wire scheduleAbStopLoss() 启动时(跟 emergency-post-review / quota-expiry-cleanup 同 pattern)
不破坏 PRD-12/13 7 BullMQ cron(错峰 violation 04:00 / cost 15分 / KPI 00:00 / emergency 03:30 / quota 00:30 / anomaly 05:00 / compliance 06:00)
pnpm audit / test ≥ 1750 / typecheck 全 PASS
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: [审计超时] 等待超过 180 分钟，自动跳过审计

anti_patterns.lesson: Dedupe per experimentId per day · 必 adminAuditLog.findFirst 校验
anti_patterns.antipattern: cron 每 hour 扫无 dedupe · 同实验多次 stop
anti_patterns.correct: adminAuditLog.findFirst({eventType:'ab_experiment_auto_stop_loss', payload.experimentId, createdAt:{gte:24h ago}}) · 存在则 skip

anti_patterns.lesson: stop_loser 双条件 (pValue<0.05 AND effect<-30%)
anti_patterns.antipattern: 仅看 pValue<0.05 触发(可能 effect=-5% 但显著 · 不该停)
anti_patterns.correct: if (rec === 'stop_loser' && effect < -0.3) trigger · 防小幅恶化也停

anti_patterns.lesson: stopReason 区分 auto_stop_loss vs manual
anti_patterns.antipattern: 不区分 stopReason · audit 看不出来源
anti_patterns.correct: stopReason 字段 + audit eventType('auto_stop_loss' vs 'manual_stop')区分

apps/api/src/workers/trending-scraper/index.ts brownfield · 启动前调 getFeatureFlagValue('stop_trending_scraper') · 若 true → logger.warn + return(不跑抓取)
apps/api/src/agents/evolution/EvolutionAgent.ts brownfield · execute() 起始检查 getSystemConfigValue('stop_evolution_agent') · 若 true → return { isFallback: true, modelUsed: 'emergency-disabled' }

apps/api/src/services/context-assembler/ContextAssembler.ts brownfield · _fetchActivePrompt + _fetchActiveConstants 前检查 getSystemConfigValue('enable_fallback_prompt') · 若 true → 跳过 DB 查询 · 直接 fallback to templates/*.ts + lib/constants/*.ts
emergencyToggleSystemConfig 内部:_updateSystemConfigInTx({configKey, configValue:true, adminId, approvalRequestId}) + emergencyApprove(requestId, superAdminId, incidentId) + 自动 postReviewRequired=true

钉钉告警 D-077 isMock=true 默认
24h 后置复核 cron · 复用 PRD-13 US-002 emergency-post-review.job · 扩 actionType='emergency_switch_triggered' 到扫描范围

userStories.title: 套餐/行业灰度 + 用户白名单 + 任意 future feature_flag
userStories.description: 作为 super_admin · 我需要扩展 feature_flags 支持 3 复杂 flagType · percentage(灰度) / targeted(套餐/行业/用户名单) / 任意 future flag。每个 flag 修改走 dual approval。
acceptanceCriteria: getFeatureFlagValue(flagKey, userId) flagType='percentage' · md5(${userId}:${flagKey}).slice(0,8) % 100 < rolloutConfig.percentage → enabled · deterministic · 同 user × flag 多次调一致
getFeatureFlagValue(flagKey, userId, plan) flagType='targeted' · userId in rolloutConfig.target_users OR plan in rolloutConfig.target_plans → enabled · 否则 disabled

rolloutConfig zod schema discriminatedUnion · z.object({flagType:z.literal('boolean')}) | percentage:number 0-100 | targeted: target_users z.number().int().array().optional() + target_plans z.enum(['free','pro','enterprise']).array().optional()
toggleFeatureFlag(flagKey, enabled, rolloutConfig, adminId) 支持任意 flagKey · 即使 seed 时不存在 · upsert 创建 + 走 dual approval
tests/unit/api/admin/feature-flag-routing.test.ts ≥ 8 it · percentage 0% 全 false / 50% ~50% true / 100% 全 true · targeted user_id 匹配 · plan 匹配 · boolean 简单 toggle · 未知 flagKey upsert+dual
不破坏 US-012 3 关键紧急开关(都是 boolean flagType)
